areas.label: The Economy
areas.synthesis: Remittances and IGAE both rebounded in spring, giving the first hard evidence the economy is climbing out of Q1's contraction, even as an OMA investor flags slower air-traffic growth ahead.

headlines.title: April economic activity (IGAE) rebounds +2.3% — strongest in ~5 years
Vinci Airports, accionista de OMA, apuesta por México pese a desaceleración del tráfico aéreo

areas.label: Money & fintech
areas.synthesis: A sovereign downgrade to the last investment-grade rung coincides with rising coffee prices and a Banxico rate path expected to stay flat this year before hikes resume in 2027.

headlines.title: Moody's cuts Mexico to Baa3, the last investment-grade rung
Precio del café se dispara en México; sube más de 100 pesos en un año
BNP Paribas prevé tres incrementos a la tasa de interés de Banxico para el 2027

areas.label: Politics & elections
areas.synthesis: Judicial elections are pushed to 2028 and the Supreme Court restructured, while Sheinbaum shifts cabinet figures into party roles — both moves setting the board for 2027.

headlines.title: Second judicial reform published in the DOF: judicial elections pushed to 2028, Supreme Court restructured
Sheinbaum confirms ~7 cabinet exits ahead of the 2027 elections

areas.label: Security
areas.synthesis: The government reports homicides at multi-year lows, down about 46% since taking office, the security metric the administration's record rests on.

headlines.title: Government reports homicides at multi-year lows — down ~46% since it took office

areas.label: US–Mexico
areas.synthesis: Washington's refusal to renew USMCA opens annual reviews through 2036, a live tariff surcharge on non-USMCA goods persists, and Mexico is now pursuing criminal complaints over migrant deaths in U.S. enforcement.

headlines.title: U.S. declines to renew USMCA, opening a 10-year annual-review cycle
Mexico to file U.S. criminal complaints over citizens' deaths in immigration enforcement
Court keeps the 10% Section 122 surcharge on non-USMCA Mexican goods in force — expires July 24
